title: GitHub - SteveVitali/claude-hibernate: Hibernate & wake Claude Code sessions across reboots. Exact session resume, 9 terminal backends (tmux, iTerm2, kitty…), macOS + Linux.
excerpt: Hibernate & wake Claude Code sessions across reboots. Exact session resume, 9 terminal backends (tmux, iTerm2, kitty…), macOS + Linux. - SteveVitali/claude-hibernate
content_html:
Hibernate your running Claude Code sessions before shutdown; wake them after reboot.

Claude Code does not record which sessions are currently running — a machine shutdown kills every session process, and after reboot you're left reconstructing what was open where. claude-hibernate is OS hibernation for those sessions: write the running set to disk before power-off, restore it at boot.

$ claude-hibernate hibernate --all
Hibernated 8 session(s) (scope=all) to ~/.local/state/claude-hibernate/snapshot.json

  ... reboot ...

$ claude-hibernate wake
Waking sessions as a 2-column pane grid in a new iTerm2 window...

Each session comes back in its original directory, on its original session id, with its original launch flags (--model, --dangerously-skip-permissions, ...), in your terminal of choice.

Why not just claude --continue? It resumes only the most recent session per directory — so it can't bring back the dozen sessions you had spread across a dozen repos, and it can't disambiguate several concurrent sessions in one worktree. wake restores all of them, unattended, each on its own id. (more in the FAQ)

Install

Homebrew (via tap):

brew install SteveVitali/tap/claude-hibernate

curl:

curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SteveVitali/claude-hibernate/main/install.sh | bash

Manual — it's one self-contained bash script:

git clone https://github.com/SteveVitali/claude-hibernate.git
cp claude-hibernate/scripts/claude-hibernate.sh ~/.local/bin/claude-hibernate

Requires bash 3.2+ (macOS system bash works), python3, and standard Unix tools. Then:

claude-hibernate doctor   # verify your environment end-to-end

Quick start

# --- Before shutdown ---
claude-hibernate hibernate --all       # capture every session on the machine
claude-hibernate hibernate             # ... or just this repo's worktrees
claude-hibernate hibernate --dry-run   # preview the table; writes nothing

# --- After reboot ---
claude-hibernate list                  # see what's in the snapshot
claude-hibernate wake --dry-run        # print the resume commands first
claude-hibernate wake                  # reopen + resume everything

# --- Optional: set and forget ---
claude-hibernate hooks install         # exact session tracking (see below)
claude-hibernate auto enable           # snapshot every 10 min, forever

Commands

Command What it does
hibernate Capture running sessions to the snapshot file
wake Reopen + resume every snapshotted session
list Show the snapshot (--live: currently-running sessions)
doctor Verify environment assumptions; ok/warn/FAIL per check
hooks install|uninstall|status Exact session tracking via Claude Code hooks
auto enable|disable|status Periodic auto-snapshot (launchd/systemd/cron)

Scope flags (hibernate, list --live, wake --live): --repo (current repo's worktrees, default), --here ($PWD only), --all (whole machine).

Wake flags: --dry-run (print commands), --fork (resume with --fork-session, fresh ids), --live (source running sessions instead of the snapshot), --launcher <name> (force a terminal backend), --quiet.

How detection works

Finding "running Claude Code sessions" is genuinely tricky — pgrep -x claude misses most real installs. The process is named after the version (e.g. 2.1.202) for native installs, and on Linux Claude rewrites both the process name and command line. claude-hibernate layers four classification rules:

  1. Name — the process basenames to claude (Homebrew/npm on macOS).
  2. Binary path — a version-shaped name whose executable path contains claude (native installer).
  3. Project correlation — a version-shaped name whose working directory maps to a real ~/.claude/projects/<mangled-cwd> directory.
  4. Args — the command line starts with claude (belt and braces).

Each surviving process is mapped to its cwd (lsof / /proc), git branch, and session id. Session ids are resolved with three precedence levels:

  1. Hook records (exact) — if you ran claude-hibernate hooks install, Claude Code itself reports each session's id at startup via a SessionStart hook. Zero guessing.
  2. --resume <uuid> in the process args (exact) — visible on macOS.
  3. Newest transcript heuristic — the N newest .jsonl transcripts in the project directory map to the N processes running there. Right in practice; ambiguous only when several sessions share one directory.

hibernate records all of it to the snapshot; wake reads only the snapshot (the processes are gone by then). The SRC column in list/--dry-run output tells you which method resolved each session (hook vs heuristic).

Terminal launchers

wake auto-detects your terminal, or force one with --launcher / CLAUDE_HIBERNATE_LAUNCHER:

Launcher Platform Behavior
tmux anywhere Windows in your current session, or a detached claude-wake session
iterm2 macOS 2-column pane grid in one new window
terminal macOS One Terminal.app window per session
kitty / wezterm / alacritty any OS windows / native tabs per session
gnome-terminal / konsole Linux Tabs per session
print anywhere Just prints the cd … && claude --resume … commands

Inside tmux, tmux always wins. Everything falls back to print — wake never strands you.

Auto-snapshot

claude-hibernate auto enable              # every 10 minutes
claude-hibernate auto enable --interval 5
claude-hibernate auto status
claude-hibernate auto disable

Installs a launchd agent (macOS), systemd user timer, or crontab entry (Linux) running hibernate --all --quiet. Snapshots are cheap, atomic, and keep 10 timestamped generations in history/ — so even an unplanned power loss costs you at most the last interval.

State layout

${XDG_STATE_HOME:-~/.local/state}/claude-hibernate/
├── snapshot.json    # current snapshot (schema 2, atomic writes)
├── history/         # last 10 timestamped snapshots
└── live/            # hook-maintained per-pid session records

Overrides: CLAUDE_HIBERNATE_STATE_DIR, CLAUDE_HIBERNATE_FILE, CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR, CLAUDE_HIBERNATE_HISTORY_KEEP. A legacy v0 snapshot (~/.local/state/claude-hibernate.json) is still read if no new-style snapshot exists.

Using as an Agent Skill

The repo doubles as a skill directory (SKILL.md), so Claude Code can drive it conversationally:

ln -s /path/to/claude-hibernate ~/.claude/skills/claude-hibernate

Then: "hibernate my sessions" / "wake my sessions" in any conversation.

Related projects

needs tmux? needs pre-setup? rescues already-running sessions? exact session ids? platforms
claude-hibernate no no (hooks optional) yes yes with hooks; heuristic otherwise macOS + Linux, 9 terminal backends
tmux-resurrect / continuum yes yes (plugin) no n/a (restores panes, not Claude sessions) anywhere tmux runs
tmux-assistant-resurrect yes yes (plugin) no yes (parses pane content) tmux only
agent-resume-style wrappers no yes (must launch claude through the wrapper) no yes varies

If you already live entirely inside tmux with resurrect/continuum configured, a tmux-centric tool restores your whole layout and is the better fit — pair it with claude --continue per pane. claude-hibernate is for everyone else: no wrapper, no plugin, works on sessions that are already running when you first install it.

FAQ

Why not just claude --continue? It resumes only the most recent session per directory, you must remember which directories were live, and it can't disambiguate N concurrent sessions in one worktree. wake restores all of them, unattended.

Will this break when Claude Code updates? Possibly — transcript internals are an unsupported surface. That's why doctor exists, why hook-tracked sessions bypass the heuristics entirely, and why every heuristic degrades soft (empty summary, heuristic source tag) rather than failing.

macOS asked me to allow Automation on first wake. That's the one-time osascript → iTerm2/Terminal permission prompt; approve it and wake proceeds.

Why bash? Zero-install portability: one file, runs on the macOS system bash (3.2) and any Linux, with python3 only for JSON.

Does hibernate stop the sessions? No — it's a snapshot, not a freeze. Your shutdown kills the processes; the snapshot is what lets wake bring them back.

What about Codex / other agents? Out of scope for 1.0 — see Roadmap.

Roadmap

Deliberately out of scope for 1.0, candidates for later: waking into the previous model/permission state beyond captured flags, Ghostty automation (not scriptable yet — use tmux inside Ghostty), Codex/other-agent support, Windows/WSL, and restoring full terminal layouts (use tmux-resurrect for that).

Caveats

  • Unsupported surface: Anthropic documents transcript internals as subject to change on any release. This tool touches them minimally (filenames for session ids, best-effort summaries), and hooks install avoids the heuristics entirely — but a Claude Code update can still break detection. claude-hibernate doctor after upgrades tells you exactly what still works.
  • Waking while the original sessions still run would attach two processes to one session id — wake detects this and skips those sessions (--fork overrides by branching to fresh ids).
  • Flag capture reads process args, which Linux Claude rewrites — on Linux, flags come back only for sessions tracked via hooks.

Uninstall

claude-hibernate auto disable     # remove launchd/systemd/cron job, if enabled
claude-hibernate hooks uninstall  # remove Claude Code hooks, if installed
rm -f ~/.local/bin/claude-hibernate            # or: brew uninstall claude-hibernate
rm -rf ~/.local/state/claude-hibernate         # snapshots + history

Development

shellcheck -x scripts/claude-hibernate.sh   # lint
bats tests/                                 # 44 tests, fully isolated

See CONTRIBUTING.md and docs/SPEC.md for architecture and design decisions, and RELEASING.md for the release process.

Related

Extracted from agent-skills, a collection of research-grounded, harness-agnostic process skills for AI coding agents — this tool is Claude Code-specific by nature, so it lives on its own.

License

MIT

sentences.zh: 在关闭之前休眠正在运行的 Claude Code 会话；重新启动后唤醒它们。

blocks.html_en: Claude Code does not record which sessions are currently running — a machine shutdown kills every session process, and after reboot you're left reconstructing what was open where. claude-hibernate is OS hibernation for those sessions: write the running set to disk before power-off, restore it at boot.

sentences.en: claude-hibernate is OS hibernation for those sessions: write the running set to disk before power-off, restore it at boot.
sentences.zh: claude-hibernate 是这些会话的操作系统休眠：在断电前将运行集写入磁盘，在启动时恢复它。

blocks.html_en: Each session comes back in its original directory, on its original session id, with its original launch flags (--model, --dangerously-skip-permissions, ...), in your terminal of choice.

blocks.html_en: Why not just claude --continue? It resumes only the most recent session per directory — so it can't bring back the dozen sessions you had spread across a dozen repos, and it can't disambiguate several concurrent sessions in one worktree. wake restores all of them, unattended, each on its own id. (more in the FAQ)

sentences.en: It resumes only the most recent session per directory — so it can't bring back the dozen sessions you had spread across a dozen repos, and it can't disambiguate several concurrent sessions in one worktree.
sentences.zh: 它仅恢复每个目录的最新会话 - 因此它无法恢复您分布在十几个存储库中的十几个会话，并且它无法消除一个工作树中的多个并发会话的歧义。

sentences.en: wake restores all of them, unattended, each on its own id.
sentences.zh: 唤醒会在无人值守的情况下恢复所有这些，每个都有自己的 ID。

sentences.en: --resume <uuid> in the process args (exact) — visible on macOS.
sentences.zh: --resume <uuid> 在进程参数中（精确）- 在 macOS 上可见。

blocks.html_en: • Newest transcript heuristic — the N newest .jsonl transcripts in the project directory map to the N processes running there. Right in practice; ambiguous only when several sessions share one directory.

sentences.en: Newest transcript heuristic — the N newest .jsonl transcripts in the project directory map to the N processes running there.
sentences.zh: 最新转录本启发式 — 项目目录中的 N 个最新 .jsonl 转录本映射到在那里运行的 N 个进程。

sentences.en: Right in practice; ambiguous only when several sessions share one directory.
sentences.zh: 实践中正确；仅当多个会话共享一个目录时才不明确。

blocks.html_en: hibernate records all of it to the snapshot; wake reads only the snapshot (the processes are gone by then). The SRC column in list/--dry-run output tells you which method resolved each session (hook vs heuristic).

sentences.en: hibernate records all of it to the snapshot; wake reads only the snapshot (the processes are gone by then).
sentences.zh: hibernate将其全部记录到快照中；唤醒仅读取快照（此时进程已消失）。

sentences.en: The SRC column in list/--dry-run output tells you which method resolved each session (hook vs heuristic).
sentences.zh: list/--dry-run 输出中的 SRC 列告诉您哪种方法解决了每个会话（钩子与启发式）。

blocks.html_en: Inside tmux, tmux always wins. Everything falls back to print — wake never strands you.

sentences.zh: 在 tmux 内部，tmux 总是获胜。

sentences.en: Everything falls back to print — wake never strands you.

blocks.html_en: Installs a launchd agent (macOS), systemd user timer, or crontab entry (Linux) running hibernate --all --quiet. Snapshots are cheap, atomic, and keep 10 timestamped generations in history/ — so even an unplanned power loss costs you at most the last interval.

sentences.en: Installs a launchd agent (macOS), systemd user timer, or crontab entry (Linux) running hibernate --all --quiet.
sentences.zh: 安装运行 hibernate --all --quiet 的 launchd 代理 (macOS)、systemd 用户计时器或 crontab 条目 (Linux)。

sentences.en: Snapshots are cheap, atomic, and keep 10 timestamped generations in history/ — so even an unplanned power loss costs you at most the last interval.
sentences.zh: 快照成本低廉、具有原子性，并且在历史记录中保留 10 个带有时间戳的世代 - 因此，即使是意外断电，最多也会在最后一个时间间隔内造成损失。
状态布局

blocks.html_en: Overrides: CLAUDE_HIBERNATE_STATE_DIR, CLAUDE_HIBERNATE_FILE, CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR, CLAUDE_HIBERNATE_HISTORY_KEEP. A legacy v0 snapshot (~/.local/state/claude-hibernate.json) is still read if no new-style snapshot exists.

sentences.zh: 覆盖：CLAUDE_HIBERNATE_STATE_DIR、CLAUDE_HIBERNATE_FILE、CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR、CLAUDE_HIBERNATE_HISTORY_KEEP。

sentences.en: A legacy v0 snapshot (~/.local/state/claude-hibernate.json) is still read if no new-style snapshot exists.
sentences.zh: 如果不存在新式快照，仍会读取旧版 v0 快照 (~/.local/state/claude-hibernate.json)。

blocks.html_en: If you already live entirely inside tmux with resurrect/continuum configured, a tmux-centric tool restores your whole layout and is the better fit — pair it with claude --continue per pane. claude-hibernate is for everyone else: no wrapper, no plugin, works on sessions that are already running when you first install it.

sentences.en: If you already live entirely inside tmux with resurrect/continuum configured, a tmux-centric tool restores your whole layout and is the better fit — pair it with claude --continue per pane.
sentences.zh: 如果您已经完全生活在 tmux 中并配置了复活/连续体，那么以 tmux 为中心的工具会恢复您的整个布局，并且更适合 - 将其与每个窗格的 claude --continue 配对。

sentences.en: claude-hibernate is for everyone else: no wrapper, no plugin, works on sessions that are already running when you first install it.
sentences.zh: claude-hibernate 适用于其他人：没有包装器，没有插件，适用于首次安装时已经运行的会话。

blocks.html_en: Why not just claude --continue? It resumes only the most recent session per directory, you must remember which directories were live, and it can't disambiguate N concurrent sessions in one worktree. wake restores all of them, unattended.

sentences.zh: 为什么不直接克劳德——继续？

sentences.en: It resumes only the most recent session per directory, you must remember which directories were live, and it can't disambiguate N concurrent sessions in one worktree.
sentences.zh: 它仅恢复每个目录的最新会话，您必须记住哪些目录是活动的，并且它无法消除一个工作树中的 N 个并发会话的歧义。

sentences.en: wake restores all of them, unattended.
sentences.zh: 唤醒恢复所有这些，无人看管。

blocks.html_en: Will this break when Claude Code updates? Possibly — transcript internals are an unsupported surface. That's why doctor exists, why hook-tracked sessions bypass the heuristics entirely, and why every heuristic degrades soft (empty summary, heuristic source tag) rather than failing.

sentences.en: Will this break when Claude Code updates?
sentences.zh: 当克劳德代码更新时，这个会中断吗？

sentences.en: Possibly — transcript internals are an unsupported surface.
sentences.zh: 可能——转录本内部是一个不受支撑的表面。

sentences.en: That's why doctor exists, why hook-tracked sessions bypass the heuristics entirely, and why every heuristic degrades soft (empty summary, heuristic source tag) rather than failing.
sentences.zh: 这就是 Doctor 存在的原因，为什么钩子跟踪会话完全绕过启发式，以及为什么每个启发式都会降低软性（空摘要，启发式源标签）而不是失败。

blocks.html_en: macOS asked me to allow Automation on first wake. That's the one-time osascript → iTerm2/Terminal permission prompt; approve it and wake proceeds.

sentences.en: macOS asked me to allow Automation on first wake.
sentences.zh: macOS 要求我在第一次唤醒时允许自动化。

sentences.en: That's the one-time osascript → iTerm2/Terminal permission prompt; approve it and wake proceeds.
sentences.zh: 这就是一次性的 osascript → iTerm2/Terminal 权限提示；批准它并唤醒继续。

blocks.html_en: Why bash? Zero-install portability: one file, runs on the macOS system bash (3.2) and any Linux, with python3 only for JSON.

sentences.zh: 为什么要痛击？

sentences.en: Zero-install portability: one file, runs on the macOS system bash (3.2) and any Linux, with python3 only for JSON.
sentences.zh: 零安装可移植性：一个文件，可在 macOS 系统 bash (3.2) 和任何 Linux 上运行，Python3 仅适用于 JSON。

blocks.html_en: Does hibernate stop the sessions? No — it's a snapshot, not a freeze. Your shutdown kills the processes; the snapshot is what lets wake bring them back.

sentences.zh: 休眠会停止会话吗？

sentences.en: No — it's a snapshot, not a freeze.
sentences.zh: 不——这是一个快照，而不是冻结。

sentences.en: Your shutdown kills the processes; the snapshot is what lets wake bring them back.
sentences.zh: 您的关闭会杀死进程；快照是让醒来让他们回来的东西。

blocks.html_en: What about Codex / other agents? Out of scope for 1.0 — see Roadmap.

sentences.zh: Codex/其他代理怎么样？

sentences.en: Out of scope for 1.0 — see Roadmap.
sentences.zh: 超出 1.0 的范围 - 请参阅路线图。
路线图

blocks.html_en: Deliberately out of scope for 1.0, candidates for later: waking into the previous model/permission state beyond captured flags, Ghostty automation (not scriptable yet — use tmux inside Ghostty), Codex/other-agent support, Windows/WSL, and restoring full terminal layouts (use tmux-resurrect for that).

sentences.en: Deliberately out of scope for 1.0, candidates for later: waking into the previous model/permission state beyond captured flags, Ghostty automation (not scriptable yet — use tmux inside Ghostty), Codex/other-agent support, Windows/WSL, and restoring full terminal layouts (use tmux-resurrect for that).
sentences.zh: 故意超出 1.0 的范围，以后的候选者：唤醒到捕获标志之外的先前模型/权限状态、Ghostty 自动化（尚不可编写脚本 - 在 Ghostty 中使用 tmux）、Codex/其他代理支持、Windows/WSL 以及恢复完整的终端布局（为此使用 tmux-resurrect）。
注意事项

blocks.html_en: • Unsupported surface: Anthropic documents transcript internals as subject to change on any release. This tool touches them minimally (filenames for session ids, best-effort summaries), and hooks install avoids the heuristics entirely — but a Claude Code update can still break detection. claude-hibernate doctor after upgrades tells you exactly what still works.

sentences.en: Unsupported surface: Anthropic documents transcript internals as subject to change on any release.
sentences.zh: 不受支持的表面：人为记录的内部记录可能会在任何版本中发生变化。

sentences.en: This tool touches them minimally (filenames for session ids, best-effort summaries), and hooks install avoids the heuristics entirely — but a Claude Code update can still break detection.
sentences.zh: 该工具很少接触它们（会话 ID 的文件名、尽力而为的摘要），并且 hooks 安装完全避免了启发式方法 - 但 Claude 代码更新仍然可能会破坏检测。

sentences.en: claude-hibernate doctor after upgrades tells you exactly what still works.
sentences.zh: 升级后的 claude-hibernate doctor 会告诉你到底什么仍然有效。

blocks.html_en: • Waking while the original sessions still run would attach two processes to one session id — wake detects this and skips those sessions (--fork overrides by branching to fresh ids).

sentences.en: Waking while the original sessions still run would attach two processes to one session id — wake detects this and skips those sessions (--fork overrides by branching to fresh ids).
sentences.zh: 当原始会话仍在运行时唤醒会将两个进程附加到一个会话 ID —wake 检测到这一点并跳过这些会话（--fork 通过分支到新 ID 进行覆盖）。

blocks.html_en: • Flag capture reads process args, which Linux Claude rewrites — on Linux, flags come back only for sessions tracked via hooks.

sentences.en: Flag capture reads process args, which Linux Claude rewrites — on Linux, flags come back only for sessions tracked via hooks.
sentences.zh: 标志捕获读取进程参数，Linux Claude 重写了该参数 - 在 Linux 上，标志仅针对通过钩子跟踪的会话返回。

sentences.en: See CONTRIBUTING.md and docs/SPEC.md for architecture and design decisions, and RELEASING.md for the release process.

blocks.html_en: Extracted from agent-skills, a collection of research-grounded, harness-agnostic process skills for AI coding agents — this tool is Claude Code-specific by nature, so it lives on its own.

sentences.en: Extracted from agent-skills, a collection of research-grounded, harness-agnostic process skills for AI coding agents — this tool is Claude Code-specific by nature, so it lives on its own.
sentences.zh: 提取自代理技能，这是一组基于研究、与工具无关的人工智能编码代理流程技能——该工具本质上是 Claude Code 特定的，因此它可以独立存在。
执照

content_html_zh:
在关闭之前休眠正在运行的 Claude Code 会话；重新启动后唤醒它们。

Claude Code 不会记录当前正在运行的会话 - 机器关闭会杀死每个会话进程，重新启动后，您只能重建在哪里打开的内容。 claude-hibernate 是这些会话的操作系统休眠：在断电前将运行集写入磁盘，在启动时恢复它。

$ claude-hibernate hibernate --all
Hibernated 8 session(s) (scope=all) to ~/.local/state/claude-hibernate/snapshot.json

  ... reboot ...

$ claude-hibernate wake
Waking sessions as a 2-column pane grid in a new iTerm2 window...

每个会话都会在您选择的终端中返回到其原始目录、原始会话 ID 以及原始启动标志（--model、--dangerously-skip-permissions...）。

为什么不直接克劳德——继续？ 它仅恢复每个目录的最新会话 - 因此它无法恢复您分布在十几个存储库中的十几个会话，并且它无法消除一个工作树中的多个并发会话的歧义。 唤醒会在无人值守的情况下恢复所有这些，每个都有自己的 ID。 （更多常见问题解答中）

安装

自制（通过水龙头）：

brew install SteveVitali/tap/claude-hibernate

curl:

curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SteveVitali/claude-hibernate/main/install.sh | bash

手册 — 这是一个独立的 bash 脚本：

git clone https://github.com/SteveVitali/claude-hibernate.git
cp claude-hibernate/scripts/claude-hibernate.sh ~/.local/bin/claude-hibernate

需要 bash 3.2+（macOS 系统 bash 可以工作）、python3 和标准 Unix 工具。 然后：

claude-hibernate doctor   # verify your environment end-to-end

快速启动

# --- Before shutdown ---
claude-hibernate hibernate --all       # capture every session on the machine
claude-hibernate hibernate             # ... or just this repo's worktrees
claude-hibernate hibernate --dry-run   # preview the table; writes nothing

# --- After reboot ---
claude-hibernate list                  # see what's in the snapshot
claude-hibernate wake --dry-run        # print the resume commands first
claude-hibernate wake                  # reopen + resume everything

# --- Optional: set and forget ---
claude-hibernate hooks install         # exact session tracking (see below)
claude-hibernate auto enable           # snapshot every 10 min, forever

命令

命令 它的作用
休眠 将正在运行的会话捕获到快照文件
wake 重新打开+恢复每个快照会话
list 显示快照（--live：当前正在运行的会话）
医生 验证环境假设；每次检查正常/警告/失败
挂钩安装|卸载|状态 通过 Claude Code hooks 进行精确的会话跟踪
自动启用|禁用|状态 定期自动快照（launchd/systemd/cron）

范围标志（hibernate、list --live、wake --live）：--repo（当前存储库的工作树，默认）、--here（仅限 $PWD）、--all（整个机器）。

唤醒标志：--dry-run（打印命令）、--fork（使用 --fork-session、新鲜 ID 恢复）、--live（源运行会话而不是快照）、--launcher <name>（强制终端后端）、--quiet。

检测的工作原理

查找“正在运行的 Claude 代码会话”确实很棘手 - pgrep -x claude 会错过大多数实际安装。 该进程以本机安装的版本（例如 2.1.202）命名，在 Linux 上，Claude 重写了进程名称和命令行。 claude-hibernate层的四种分类规则：

  1. 名称 — claude 的进程基本名称（macOS 上的 Homebrew/npm）。
  2. 二进制路径 — 版本形状的名称，其可执行路径包含 claude（本机安装程序）。
  3. 项目相关性——一个版本形状的名称，其工作目录映射到真实的 ~/.claude/projects/<mangled-cwd> 目录。
  4. Args — 命令行以 claude（腰带和大括号）开头。

每个幸存的进程都映射到它的 cwd (lsof //proc)、git 分支和会话 id。 会话 ID 通过三个优先级进行解析：

  1. 挂钩记录（准确）——如果您运行 claude-hibernate hooks install，Claude Code 本身会在启动时通过 SessionStart 挂钩报告每个会话的 id。 零猜测。
  2. --resume <uuid> 在进程参数中（精确）- 在 macOS 上可见。
  3. 最新转录本启发式 — 项目目录中的 N 个最新 .jsonl 转录本映射到在那里运行的 N 个进程。 实践中正确；仅当多个会话共享一个目录时才不明确。

hibernate将其全部记录到快照中；唤醒仅读取快照（此时进程已消失）。 list/--dry-run 输出中的 SRC 列告诉您哪种方法解决了每个会话（钩子与启发式）。

终端启动器

唤醒自动检测您的终端，或使用 --launcher / CLAUDE_HIBERNATE_LAUNCHER 强制终端：

启动器 平台 行为
tmux 任何地方 当前会话中的 Windows，或独立的 claude-wake 会话
iterm2 macOS 一个新窗口中的 2 列窗格网格
终端 macOS 每个会话一个 Terminal.app 窗口
凯蒂 / wezterm / alacritty any 每个会话的操作系统窗口/本机选项卡
gnome 终端/控制台 Linux 每个会话的选项卡
print 任何地方 只需打印 cd ... && claude --resume ... 命令

在 tmux 内部，tmux 总是获胜。 一切都会回到打印状态——唤醒永远不会让你陷入困境。

自动快照

claude-hibernate auto enable              # every 10 minutes
claude-hibernate auto enable --interval 5
claude-hibernate auto status
claude-hibernate auto disable

安装运行 hibernate --all --quiet 的 launchd 代理 (macOS)、systemd 用户计时器或 crontab 条目 (Linux)。 快照成本低廉、具有原子性，并且在历史记录中保留 10 个带有时间戳的世代 - 因此，即使是意外断电，最多也会在最后一个时间间隔内造成损失。

状态布局

${XDG_STATE_HOME:-~/.local/state}/claude-hibernate/
├── snapshot.json    # current snapshot (schema 2, atomic writes)
├── history/         # last 10 timestamped snapshots
└── live/            # hook-maintained per-pid session records

覆盖：CLAUDE_HIBERNATE_STATE_DIR、CLAUDE_HIBERNATE_FILE、CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR、CLAUDE_HIBERNATE_HISTORY_KEEP。 如果不存在新式快照，仍会读取旧版 v0 快照 (~/.local/state/claude-hibernate.json)。

作为代理技能使用

该存储库兼作技能目录 (SKILL.md)，因此 Claude Code 可以通过对话方式驱动它：

ln -s /path/to/claude-hibernate ~/.claude/skills/claude-hibernate

然后：在任何对话中“休眠我的会话”/“唤醒我的会话”。

相关项目

需要tmux吗？ 需要预先设置吗？ 拯救已经运行的会话？ 确切的会话 ID？ 平台
克劳德·希伯纳特 no 否（挂钩可选） yes 是的，带钩子；否则启发式 macOS + Linux，9 个终端后端
tmux-复活/连续体 yes 是（插件） no 不适用（恢复窗格，而不是 Claude 会话） tmux 运行的任何地方
tmux 助手复活 yes 是（插件） no 是（解析窗格内容） 仅 tmux
代理简历风格包装器 no 是（必须通过包装器启动克劳德） no yes 各不相同

如果您已经完全生活在 tmux 中并配置了复活/连续体，那么以 tmux 为中心的工具会恢复您的整个布局，并且更适合 - 将其与每个窗格的 claude --continue 配对。 claude-hibernate 适用于其他人：没有包装器，没有插件，适用于首次安装时已经运行的会话。

FAQ

为什么不直接克劳德——继续？ 它仅恢复每个目录的最新会话，您必须记住哪些目录是活动的，并且它无法消除一个工作树中的 N 个并发会话的歧义。 唤醒恢复所有这些，无人看管。

当克劳德代码更新时，这个会中断吗？ 可能——转录本内部是一个不受支撑的表面。 这就是 Doctor 存在的原因，为什么钩子跟踪会话完全绕过启发式，以及为什么每个启发式都会降低软性（空摘要，启发式源标签）而不是失败。

macOS 要求我在第一次唤醒时允许自动化。 这就是一次性的 osascript → iTerm2/Terminal 权限提示；批准它并唤醒继续。

为什么要痛击？ 零安装可移植性：一个文件，可在 macOS 系统 bash (3.2) 和任何 Linux 上运行，Python3 仅适用于 JSON。

休眠会停止会话吗？ 不——这是一个快照，而不是冻结。 您的关闭会杀死进程；快照是让醒来让他们回来的东西。

Codex/其他代理怎么样？ 超出 1.0 的范围 - 请参阅路线图。

路线图

故意超出 1.0 的范围，以后的候选者：唤醒到捕获标志之外的先前模型/权限状态、Ghostty 自动化（尚不可编写脚本 - 在 Ghostty 中使用 tmux）、Codex/其他代理支持、Windows/WSL 以及恢复完整的终端布局（为此使用 tmux-resurrect）。

注意事项

  • 不受支持的表面：人为记录的内部记录可能会在任何版本中发生变化。 该工具很少接触它们（会话 ID 的文件名、尽力而为的摘要），并且 hooks 安装完全避免了启发式方法 - 但 Claude 代码更新仍然可能会破坏检测。 升级后的 claude-hibernate doctor 会告诉你到底什么仍然有效。
  • 当原始会话仍在运行时唤醒会将两个进程附加到一个会话 ID —wake 检测到这一点并跳过这些会话（--fork 通过分支到新 ID 进行覆盖）。
  • 标志捕获读取进程参数，Linux Claude 重写了该参数 - 在 Linux 上，标志仅针对通过钩子跟踪的会话返回。

卸载

claude-hibernate auto disable     # remove launchd/systemd/cron job, if enabled
claude-hibernate hooks uninstall  # remove Claude Code hooks, if installed
rm -f ~/.local/bin/claude-hibernate            # or: brew uninstall claude-hibernate
rm -rf ~/.local/state/claude-hibernate         # snapshots + history

发展

shellcheck -x scripts/claude-hibernate.sh   # lint
bats tests/                                 # 44 tests, fully isolated

有关架构和设计决策，请参阅 CONTRIBUTING.md 和 docs/SPEC.md；有关发布过程，请参阅 RELEASING.md。

有关的

提取自代理技能，这是一组基于研究、与工具无关的人工智能编码代理流程技能——该工具本质上是 Claude Code 特定的，因此它可以独立存在。
